reason: All acceptance criteria verified. EmotionCategory enum (POSITIVE/NEGATIVE/NEUTRAL). EmotionScore frozen dataclass intensity 0.0-1.0. EmotionTracker exponential decay = e^(-0.693*hours_ago/half_life). POSITIVE +intensity*decay, NEGATIVE -intensity*decay, weighted average. NEUTRAL=0 contribution. consecutive_negative_count from tail stops at non-NEGATIVE. should_escalate at >=3. Default half_life=24h, configurable. All 30/30 tests pass. Coverage 98%.
